determinands.name: Dissolved Oxygen
determinands.desc: Oxygen dissolved in water; critical for aquatic life survival

determinands.name: Dissolved Oxygen (% saturation)
determinands.desc: Percentage oxygen saturation relative to atmospheric equilibrium

determinands.name: Biochemical Oxygen Demand (BOD)
determinands.desc: Oxygen consumed by microorganisms decomposing organic matter over 5 days

determinands.name: Ammonia (unionised)
determinands.desc: Toxic form of ammonia; highly harmful to fish at low concentrations

determinands.name: Ammonia (total)
determinands.desc: Total ammonia nitrogen including ionised and unionised forms

determinands.name: pH (lower)
determinands.desc: Lower pH boundary; acidity measure

determinands.name: pH (upper)
determinands.desc: Upper pH boundary; alkalinity measure

determinands.name: Temperature
determinands.desc: Water temperature; affects dissolved oxygen and biological processes

determinands.name: Phosphate (reactive)
determinands.desc: Soluble reactive phosphorus; key nutrient causing eutrophication

determinands.name: Total Phosphorus
determinands.desc: All forms of phosphorus including dissolved and particulate

determinands.name: Nitrate
determinands.desc: Nitrogen as nitrate; agricultural runoff indicator

determinands.name: Nitrite
determinands.desc: Intermediate nitrogen compound; toxic to fish at moderate levels

determinands.name: Total Nitrogen
determinands.desc: Sum of all nitrogen species in water

determinands.name: Conductivity
determinands.desc: Electrical conductivity indicating dissolved ion concentration

determinands.name: Suspended Solids
determinands.desc: Particulate matter suspended in water column

determinands.name: Turbidity
determinands.desc: Water clarity measure; light scattering by particles

determinands.name: Chloride
determinands.desc: Chloride ion concentration; road salt and saline intrusion indicator

determinands.name: Sulphate
determinands.desc: Sulphate ion; geological and industrial discharge indicator

determinands.name: Iron (dissolved)
determinands.desc: Dissolved iron; affects water colour and aquatic habitats

determinands.name: Manganese (dissolved)
determinands.desc: Dissolved manganese; natural geological source

determinands.name: Zinc (dissolved)
determinands.desc: Dissolved zinc; industrial and urban runoff metal

determinands.name: Copper (dissolved)
determinands.desc: Dissolved copper; toxic to aquatic invertebrates

determinands.name: Lead (dissolved)
determinands.desc: Dissolved lead; legacy contamination from pipes and industry

determinands.name: Cadmium (dissolved)
determinands.desc: Dissolved cadmium; priority hazardous substance

determinands.name: Mercury (dissolved)
determinands.desc: Dissolved mercury; highly toxic bioaccumulative metal

determinands.name: Nickel (dissolved)
determinands.desc: Dissolved nickel; industrial contamination indicator

determinands.name: Chromium (dissolved)
determinands.desc: Dissolved chromium; industrial effluent contaminant

determinands.name: Arsenic (dissolved)
determinands.desc: Dissolved arsenic; natural and mining contamination

determinands.name: Fluoride
determinands.desc: Fluoride ion; natural and industrial sources

determinands.name: Chlorophyll-a
determinands.desc: Algal biomass indicator; eutrophication measure in standing waters

determinands.name: Secchi Depth
determinands.desc: Water transparency measured by Secchi disc depth

determinands.name: Total Coliforms
determinands.desc: Coliform bacteria count; faecal contamination indicator

determinands.name: E. coli
determinands.desc: Escherichia coli; primary faecal contamination indicator

determinands.name: Intestinal Enterococci
determinands.desc: Enterococci bacteria; sewage contamination indicator

determinands.name: Chemical Oxygen Demand (COD)
determinands.desc: Total oxygen required to chemically oxidise all organic and inorganic matter

determinands.name: Total Organic Carbon (TOC)
determinands.desc: Total carbon bound in organic compounds

determinands.name: Alkalinity
determinands.desc: Buffering capacity of water against pH change

determinands.name: Hardness (as CaCO3)
determinands.desc: Calcium and magnesium ion concentration; affects metal toxicity

determinands.name: Colour
determinands.desc: True colour from dissolved organic matter and metals

determinands.name: Cyanide (free)
determinands.desc: Free cyanide; highly toxic industrial contaminant

meta.note: Thresholds are indicative for general river water bodies. Specific water body type and typology may adjust values.
